title: Anthropic Claude Fable 5 now available as a Databricks-hosted model ​
body:
**June 9, 2026**

Databricks Model Serving now supports Anthropic [Claude Fable 5](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#claude-fable-5) as a Databricks-hosted model. Claude Fable 5 is built for autonomous knowledge work and coding, designed to handle long-running, complex, and asynchronous tasks with less need for human intervention.

To access this model, use [Foundation Model APIs pay-per-token](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/#token-foundation-apis).
